summary.intent: Fix two code review comments on PR #439 in the moltis repo: a prop destructuring bug in renderServerName and a display_name null-handling issue on server add.
summary.outcome: Both issues were fixed in page-mcp.js, formatted with biome, committed, pushed, and the PR threads resolved.

repo: renderServerName in page-mcp.js receives a props object and requires destructured { server }, not a raw server argument.
When adding an MCP server, display_name should send null when the field is blank rather than falling back to the technical ID.

code.finding: Both SSE (line 478) and stdio (line 499) add-server handlers needed display_name null-coalescing: send null when the field is empty instead of the technical ID.

workflow: biome is used for JS formatting/linting in this repo and is run before committing JS changes.
PR review threads are resolved programmatically after pushing fixes via GitHub API calls.
